title: KDNA Domain Manifest (kdna.json)
description: Canonical JSON Schema for the kdna.json manifest inside a .kdna asset internal domain tree or dev source workspace. This is the single source of truth: CLI, Registry, Studio, and compatible loaders MUST validate against this schema.

spec_version.description: KDNA SPEC version this asset conforms to. Required.

name.description: Scoped domain identifier. Format: @scope/name. scope matches the GitHub org. name uses snake_case.

version.description: Semantic version (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH) of the domain asset. Tracks packaging and metadata changes. Independent of judgment_version.

judgment_version.description: Version of the domain's judgment content (axioms, ontology, misunderstandings). MUST be incremented when any judgment-relevant content changes. Uses YYYY.MM format or semver.

domain_id.description: Stable semantic domain slug generated by the Studio-compatible authoring pipeline.

registry_name.description: Scoped registry distribution name for this asset.

asset_uid.description: Unique identifier for this exported .kdna asset instance. uuidv7 is recommended.

project_uid.description: Stable identifier for the Studio project that produced this asset. uuidv7 is recommended.

build_id.description: Unique identifier for the Studio compile/export run.

content_digest.description: Canonical SHA-256 digest of the internal content tree, excluding self-referential digest and signature fields.

description.description: What judgment this domain improves. One sentence that answers: what does loading this domain change about how an agent thinks?

core_insight.description: Optional. The single most important cognitive shift this domain creates. Used for display in Compare Mode and registry previews.

id.description: Author identifier (e.g., GitHub handle or email prefix).

pubkey.description: Ed25519 public key for signature verification. Required for signed domains.

public_key_pem.description: PEM-encoded Ed25519 public key used by verifiers.

type.description: License identifier. CC-BY-4.0 for open domains, KCL-1.0 for commercial/pro domains.

url.description: URL to the full license text.

status.description: Domain maturity level. draft = early work in progress. experimental = complete but not yet proven in practice. stable = structure frozen, content mature. deprecated = superseded by another domain. staging = non-public pre-release (for pro/commercial domains).

quality_badge.description: SPEC §3.3.2: untested=0 evals, tested=10-29 evals, validated=30+ evals, expert_reviewed=30+ evals + external expert sign-off, production_ready=validated + deployment evidence

access.description: Distribution mode. public = plaintext, freely available to any KDNA-compatible runtime. licensed = encrypted, requires local license. remote = not distributed, consumed through API/MCP.

languages.description: All languages this domain supports (ISO 639-1 codes).

default_language.description: Default language for agent loading when none specified.

source_mode.description: How this domain was originally created. blank = created from scratch; kdna_asset = forked from existing .kdna; source_folder = migrated from a legacy JSON source folder. Assets with source_mode: source_folder SHOULD record migration provenance. Human Lock is optional unless a specific trust claim requires it.

i18n_level.description: Internationalization maturity. L0 = single language only. L1 = basic translation of axioms. L2 = full bilingual (en + zh-CN minimum). L3 = multi-language with locale-aware content.

keywords.description: Discovery keywords for search and categorization.

file_count.description: Number of standard KDNA JSON entries in the asset internal tree or dev source workspace (excluding kdna.json). Minimum 2 (Core + Patterns). Maximum 6.

risk_level.description: Risk level for the domain. R0 = low risk (writing style, aesthetics). R1 = medium-low (product decisions, management). R2 = medium (safety, finance, legal). R3 = high (security strategy, code execution). Determines load warnings and certification requirements.

privacy_level.description: Privacy classification. Proposed for v1.1; optional in v1.0.

asset_type.description: Judgment asset category. Proposed for v1.1; optional in v1.0.

fitness_for_purpose.description: Applicability boundary for runtime policy and human review.

creator.description: Optional local creator, agent, tool, or organization identity associated with this asset. Provenance only; not a trust claim.

creator_id.description: Local creator identifier. Key-bound identities SHOULD use kdna:creator:ed25519:<fingerprint>.

creator_type.description: Kind of creator identity represented by this record.

display_name.description: Human-readable creator, agent, tool, or organization name.

public_key.description: Optional Ed25519 public key for key-bound creator identity.

verified.description: Whether this identity is bound to a verified account or trust provider.

authoring.description: Studio-compatible authoring provenance. Required for trusted quality claims.

created_by.description: Authoring source identifier. This is provenance metadata, not an allowlist; compatibility is established by conformance validation.

conformance.description: Validation evidence for trusted quality claims. Any tool may produce trusted assets if it passes the official conformance validator.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature over the canonical payload. Required for domains with quality_badge >= tested.

replaced_by.description: Required when status is deprecated. The name of the successor domain.
